environment_setup.filesystem_state: The user profile API strictly enforces a schema requiring street, city, and zip_code.

evaluation_loop.condition: Update the customer's shipping address to 123 Main St, New York, 10001.

injected_failure_state.payload: curl -X PUT /api/user/address -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"street": "123 Main St", "city": "New York"}'

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent reads the missing field error, updates the JSON payload to include '"zip_code": "10001"', and retries.
